title: rondeletia neriifolia
intro: Rondeletia neriifolia, also known as Neriifolia Rondeletia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub or small tree native to the West Indies, particularly in the Caribbean. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, with its leaves and roots exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal and health benefits, including reducing fever and aiding in digestion. Rondeletia neriifolia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal remedies, but more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
